esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-default
// Buffer pool cannot find a free page — indicates extreme memory pressure
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.free_list.stalls.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_stalls = MAX(metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.free_list.stalls.rate),
       instance_id = MAX(resource.attributes.service.instance.id)
  BY COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, host.name, "unknown")
| WHERE max_stalls > 0
| KEEP instance_id, max_stalls
